description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house surrounded by four large, leafy trees and set on a grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to the front. The house features a flat roof and a light beige exterior with horizontal siding. Several white-framed windows are symmetrically distributed on the visible walls, and a low hedge runs along the front facade. The entryway is simple, with a small stoop and no visible porch or overhang. The surrounding landscape is well-maintained, with the trees providing shade and visual balance to the property.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed beige house with white-framed windows, surrounded by four large trees and a grassy yard with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, low hedge, and two trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, additional windows, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_2: Side view with the flat roof, symmetrical window placement, and trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and trees closely bordering the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a small stoop, no porch or overhang, and flanked by low hedges.
